allow:
Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY="" python -c "
import json, urllib.request
from pathlib import Path

# Read the .env key directly
with open\(Path.home\(\) / ''.config/search-reddit/.env'', ''r''\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.startswith\(''OPENAI_API_KEY=''\):
            key = line.split\(''='', 1\)[1].strip\(\)
            break

for model in [''gpt-5-search-api'', ''gpt-4o-search-preview'', ''gpt-4o-mini-search-preview'', ''gpt-4o-mini'', ''gpt-4o'']:
    req = urllib.request.Request\(''https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions''\)
    req.add_header\(''Authorization'', f''Bearer {key}''\)
    req.add_header\(''Content-Type'', ''application/json''\)
    payload = {''model'': model, ''messages'': [{''role'': ''user'', ''content'': ''Say hi''}], ''max_tokens'': 5}
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, data=json.dumps\(payload\).encode\(\), timeout=15\) as resp:
            print\(f''{model}: OK''\)
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read\(\).decode\(\)[:200]
        print\(f''{model}: FAIL {e.code} - {body[:100]}''\)
")
